contract_claim: L54-54: The `_SENTINEL` filter `[result for result in results if result is not _SENTINEL]` is never triggered in practice. In the success path all slots are filled; in the exception + `return_exceptions=False` path the function raises before reaching this line; in the `return_exceptions=True` path exceptions are stored directly so all slots are also filled. The filter is an always-no-op guard.
observed_behavior: Replace with a plain `return list(results)` (after casting) or add an assertion `assert _SENTINEL not in results` for debugging. If the sentinel guard is intentionally defensive, document why residual sentinels could occur.
